alternative_platforms_note: Any HTTPS container platform (Cloud Run, Fly.io, Render, or a container on a VM) can host the two MCP services. Cloud Run is the documented default, not the only option.
secret_manager_note: Provide COP_MCP_TOKEN / THIEF_MCP_TOKEN via the platform secret manager or runtime environment. Never bake tokens into the image, build args, or commit them.
